title: aster foliaceus var. hesperius
intro: Aster foliaceus var. hesperius, also known as Western or Balsam Ragwort, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Aster foliaceus var. hesperius include its ability to treat skin irritations, wounds, and fungal infections, as well as its use in traditional medicine to aid digestion and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
